name: io.github.modelcontextprotocol/inspector-multi
title: MCP Inspector (multiple install methods)
description: Sample registry entry describing one server (the MCP Inspector) installable several ways — npm, an OCI/Docker image, or a hosted remote — to exercise the package-selection UI.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token used to authenticate to the inspector proxy server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_AUTO_OPEN_ENABLED
environmentVariables.description: Whether the inspector auto-opens a browser tab on launch.
